title: PublicationRecord
description: Record linking a medRxiv/bioRxiv preprint to its published peer-reviewed journal article

biorxiv_doi.description: DOI of the preprint on bioRxiv or medRxiv

published_doi.description: DOI of the corresponding published journal article

published_journal.description: Name of the journal where the article was published

preprint_platform.description: The preprint platform where the paper was posted

preprint_title.example: Efficacy of novel therapeutic approach in clinical trial

preprint_authors.description: Authors of the preprint in semicolon-separated format
preprint_authors.example: Johnson, M; Williams, P; Davis, S

preprint_date.description: Date the preprint was posted in YYYY-MM-DD format

published_date.description: Date the peer-reviewed article was published

preprint_abstract.example: Introduction: We conducted a randomized controlled trial...

preprint_author_corresponding_institutio.description: Institution affiliation of the corresponding author
